name: stitch
description: A knitting application for tracking projects and patterns

scripts.db:reset: cd database && docker-compose down -v && docker-compose up -d
scripts.ai:dev: cd ai-service && python3 -m venv venv 2>/dev/null || true && (source venv/bin/activate 2>/dev/null || . venv/bin/activate) && pip install -q -r requirements.txt 2>/dev/null || true && uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8001
scripts.ai:setup: cd ai-service && python3 -m venv venv && source venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt
